weight loss: 🥗 Maintain a caloric deficit of 300–500 calories per day.
💧 Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily to stay hydrated.
🍗 Focus on lean proteins (chicken, fish, eggs) to preserve muscle.
🥦 Fill half your plate with vegetables at every meal.
🚫 Minimize processed food, sugary drinks, and fast food.
⏰ Consider intermittent fasting (16:8) to manage calorie intake.
muscle gain: 🍳 Eat 1.6–2.2g of protein per kg of body weight daily.
🍚 Consume enough carbohydrates (rice, oats, sweet potato) for energy.
🥜 Include healthy fats (avocado, nuts, olive oil) in your diet.
⏱️ Eat a protein-rich meal within 30–60 minutes after your workout.
💊 Consider creatine supplementation for improved strength gains.
🍌 Eat calorie surplus of 200–300 calories above maintenance.
general fitness: 🌈 Eat a balanced diet with a variety of whole foods.
🥩 Include protein, carbs, and healthy fats in every meal.
🍎 Snack on fruits and nuts instead of chips or sweets.
☕ Limit caffeine and avoid energy drinks before bed.
🥛 Include calcium-rich foods (milk, yogurt) for bone health.
😴 Get 7–9 hours of sleep to support recovery and performance.
